subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant of the Most Great Name, may my spirit be a sacrifice for His loved ones! In the treatise on spiritual conduct, addressed to a certain Shaykh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه الفدا در رساله سلوک خطابا بشیخی از
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
